_strategy: DCA accumulate-and-hold. Base order + a safety order each 8% drop below the last buy; NEVER sells; NO kill switch (rides the drawdown for recovery upside). Validated in ../dca.py: 8% drops, no take-profit, beat buy-hold slightly (+2396% vs +1649%) BUT with ~88% max drawdown. Bounded by max_safety_orders(8) + allocated_capital($20k) so it can't consume the account.
_account: MUST use its own dca/.env (separate Alpaca paper account). Sharing the trend bots' account would collide on the single SOXL position.
_risk: By design this has no stop/kill switch and will sit through an ~88% drawdown. Only the allocated_capital cap bounds the loss. This is leveraged buy-and-hold + crash-buying, NOT capital preservation.
